description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building surrounded by a dense ring of mature trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout with white and gray exterior walls. The property includes a well-maintained lawn and landscaped garden areas, with some flowering shrubs adding color near the house. Large windows are visible, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The main entryway is subtly integrated into the facade, with a simple path leading up to it. The overall setting suggests a tranquil, suburban or park-like environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, and surrounded by dense trees and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway, a clear lawn, and the house partially obscured by trees, with flowering shrubs visible near the entrance.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the back of the house, with more dense tree coverage and less visible garden detail.
description_view_2: The left side view reveals the house nestled within the trees, with some flowering shrubs and a clear view of the flat roof.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the house almost entirely encircled by trees, with the white facade and large windows partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entryway with a straight path, minimal overhang, and no prominent porch or columns
